events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: heat trace missing end seal. NEC 427 covers fixed electric heating equipment for pipelines and vessels. Heat trace cable requires end seal/termination kit per manufacturer and NEC 427. Missing end seal is non-compliant and could be shock/fire hazard. Work stage rough-complete. Decision fail. Risk high? Missing end seal on heat trace: exposed conductors, moisture ingress, short circuit, fire. In industrial site maybe high. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 80? value 0. confidence 0.95. findings: missing end seal; heat trace not terminated per NEC/manufacturer. actions: install proper end seal/termination kit; inspect and megger before energization. rationale. references NEC 427 (maybe 427.10, 427.22?). Need include only JSON. Ensure valid JSON.

events.label: response

  "findings": [
    "Heat trace cable is missing the required end seal/termination kit.",
    "Unsealed cable end leaves conductors exposed to moisture and physical damage.",
    "Installation does not comply with NEC 427 and typical manufacturer instructions."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install the manufacturer-approved end seal/termination kit at the terminated end of the heat trace.",
    "Inspect the full heat trace run for additional missing seals, splices, or damage.",
    "Perform insulation resistance (megger) testing before energization.",
    "Re-inspect and document completion before close-out."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 427 requires electric heat tracing to be installed in accordance with the manufacturer’s listing and instructions, including proper end seals. A missing end seal is a code violation and creates shock, short-circuit, and fire hazards, so the work fails compliance at the rough-complete stage.",
  "references": ["NEC 427"]
}
